name: EventHandler - Damage
description: Verify Damage EventHandler loads and can be read. Damage handlers appear on skills that deal damage.

steps.name: Find skill with Damage EventHandler
steps.code: var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); var skillWithDamage = null; foreach(var skill in skills) { var handlers = (System.Collections.IList)Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.name, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null && handlers.Count > 0) { for(int i = 0; i < handlers.Count; i++) { var h = handlers[i]; var hType = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.name + "|EventHandlers[" + i + "]", "_type"); if(hType != null && hType.ToString().Contains("Damage")) { skillWithDamage = skill.name; break; } } } if(skillWithDamage != null) break; } skillWithDamage != null && !skillWithDamage.IsEmpty
